name: Alexander Bashlachev
description: '''Alexander Nikolaevich Bashlachev''' ({{lang-rus|–ź–Ľ–Ķ–ļ—Ā–įŐĀ–Ĺ–ī—Ä –Ě–ł–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–įŐĀ–Ķ–≤–ł—á –Ď–į—ą–Ľ–į—á—Ď–≤|p=…źl ≤…™ňąksandr n ≤…™k…źňąlaj…™v ≤…™t…ē b…ô āl…źňąt…ē…Ķf|a=Alyeksandr Nickolayevich Bashlachyov.ru.vorb.oga}}; 27 May 1960 ‚Äď 17 February 1988) was a [[Soviet people|Soviet]] poet, singer-songwriter and guitarist considered to be one of the most influential performers in [[Russian rock]] music.
